title: 安装配置 beads 任务追踪工具
提交当前的 Phase 1-2 改动到 git
完成解析引擎的多语言支持（Go Java C C++ C# Rust Ruby Swift Kotlin Vue Svelte Bash）
Prepare repository for GitHub upload
description: Organize root project for GitHub: document usage, keep active source/test files visible, ignore local/generated/archive artifacts, remove generated outputs from active surface, and verify default test/CLI commands.
close_reason: Prepared GitHub-ready active surface: README usage/install docs, docs/USAGE.md, packaging entry points, gitignore for local/generated/archive artifacts, manifest upload list, cleanup and validation.

title: Add fast project import controls
description: Make whole-project import usable on larger repositories: configurable excluded directories, max Python file size guard, concurrent parsing, scan skipped-file stats, and CLI flags for workers/excludes/size limit.
close_reason: Added project import controls: configurable excludes, max file size guard, concurrent parsing, skipped-file stats, summary symbol limit, CLI flags, README updates, and tests.

title: Make whole-project import the primary analyzer path
description: Update active static_flow CLI/analyzer so project directories are the default product path: fast recursive scan, clear project-level summary, file count stats, and tests proving multi-file project import. Single-file mode remains only as a debugging convenience.
close_reason: Made project directory import the primary CLI/analyzer path, added scan stats, fast directory scan with dot-dir/archive exclusions, summary/details/json modes, and multi-file project tests.

title: Archive non-mainline project code
description: Move legacy, experimental, and local analysis artifacts out of the active project surface into one archive area without deleting them. Preserve current static_flow mainline and tests.
close_reason: Archived non-mainline code under _archive/non_mainline_2026_06_13, kept active static_flow surface minimal, updated README/gitignore/pytest config, and verified analyzer entrypoint.

title: Align project around static Python call graph MVP
description: User wants the project aligned to the behavior in example.py, function_analyzer.py, and script_graph.py: parse a Python script, extract functions/classes/methods/signatures/local vars/calls, and render/export the call graph as the main product path.
close_reason: Implemented language-neutral static flow core with Python adapter, project analyzer, report/DOT exporters, example and cross-file tests.

title: Document current project state for owner
description: Why: the repository has been heavily reorganized and the owner can no longer tell what the project currently is, what changed, and how to continue. What: add a detailed root-level explanation of current architecture, folder roles, workflow, validation status, known issues, and next steps.
close_reason: Added root-level PROJECT_CURRENT_STATE.md explaining the repository reset, current static V1 architecture, legacy/runtime boundaries, validation status, known issues, and next cleanup steps.

title: Link graph selection with highlighted code panel
description: Why: the static graph now has layered layout and pinned edge focus, but the right-side code panel still renders as plain text and does not visually mark the active function range well enough for step-by-step reading. What: upgrade the debugger_web UI so the code panel renders line numbers with highlighted active ranges, keep whole-file mode grounded in that highlight, and tighten node/edge selection so graph focus and source reading stay synchronized.
close_reason: Implemented graph/code selection sync, numbered highlighted code panel, whole-file focus anchoring, and wider edge hit targets; verified with JS syntax check, targeted pytest, importlib full pytest, and Playwright UI smoke.

title: Localize CodeGraph viewers to Chinese
description: Why: the temporary CodeGraph structure and flow viewers are currently English-heavy and harder for the user to read. What: translate the standalone viewer UI labels, stats, filters, legends, inspector text, and explanatory copy to Chinese while preserving source identifiers exactly.
close_reason: Localized the CodeGraph structure and argument-flow viewers to Chinese while preserving source identifiers, regenerated both HTML files, and verified browser loading without console errors.

title: Improve static graph readability with layered layout and edge focus
description: Why: the static V1 web shell now shows connected SVG edges, but multi-hop graphs can still feel unstable and edge details disappear too quickly for step-by-step reading. What: upgrade the graph layout to a more stable layered arrangement based on structural distance from the entry symbol, add click-to-pin edge highlighting and a focused edge detail panel, and keep node double-click code inspection intact.

title: Add CodeGraph argument flow sidecar
description: Why: CodeGraph shows structural calls but not which caller expressions bind to callee parameters or where returns land. What: add a small sidecar generator that reads .codegraph/codegraph.db, parses Python source at call sites, enriches call edges with argument and return-target facts, and emits a local viewer artifact without forking CodeGraph.
close_reason: Implemented a CodeGraph sidecar that enriches Python call edges with argument bindings and return targets, generates .codegraph/flow-viewer.html, and includes focused tests.

title: Render connected static flow graph with visible line segments
description: Why: the static V1 pipeline and code panel are working, but the center view still reads like stacked cards instead of a true connected graph. What: upgrade the debugger_web static UI to render entry-centered nodes with visible SVG line segments for call/arg/return edges, preserve node double-click to open code, and add server-route tests for the static endpoints so the product matches the intended reading model.

title: Implement code panel and static web shell
description: Why: the static pipeline can now scan, parse, index symbols, extract signatures, link call/arg/return edges, and query a local graph, but the user still cannot inspect code by double-clicking a node or operate the product through a browser surface. What: add modules/code_panel plus a minimal static debugger_web flow that supports entry search, graph retrieval, and fixed-side code inspection for the static V1 pipeline.

title: Implement flow linker and graph query
description: Why: the static pipeline can now discover Python files, parse modules, index functions and methods, and extract signatures, but it still cannot draw the lines the product exists for. What: add modules/flow_linker and modules/graph_query with focused tests plus one integration scenario that proves call, arg, and return edges can form a local entry-centered graph.

title: Implement symbol index and signature extractor
description: Why: scan and parse are now stable, but the graph still cannot render meaningful nodes until functions and class methods are indexed with source ranges and explicit annotations. What: add modules/symbol_index and modules/signature_extractor with tests so the next slice can produce node records and signatures for graph construction.

title: Implement static file scanner and AST parser
description: Why: the static V1 contract layer is in place, and the next smallest useful slice is stable Python file discovery plus AST parsing. What: add modules/file_scanner and modules/python_ast_parser with narrow contract-facing APIs and unit tests so later symbol extraction can build on deterministic inputs.

title: Bootstrap static V1 contract layer
description: Why: the repo docs now point to a static Python function flow viewer, but the active package metadata and shared contracts are still runtime-debugger-first. What: align top-level metadata with the static V1 direction and create the first contracts/python_static_flow package plus tests so later modules can build against stable shared types.

title: Rewrite product docs around static function flow viewer
description: Why: the confirmed V1 direction has changed from runtime variable tracing to a static Python function flow viewer centered on function signatures, call edges, arg flow, return flow, and inline code inspection. What: update or supersede the current runtime-oriented spec and implementation plan with a static-analysis-first design and matching module roadmap.

title: Implement candidate extraction, lineage building, and timeline slice
description: Why: runner plus tracer now produce real trace events, but the user still cannot read a variable story. The next slice must turn raw events into a selected candidate, a coherent chain, and ordered timeline steps. What: implement candidate_extractor, lineage_builder, and timeline_view_model with isolated tests, then add one integration scenario chaining runner -> tracer -> candidate_extractor -> lineage_builder -> timeline_view_model.

title: Implement tracer bootstrap and trace event capture
description: Why: the product's first real value starts when runtime execution becomes structured trace events. The tracer must enter the Python child process instead of relying on in-process hacks. What: extend the shared command contract for environment injection, implement a tracer bootstrap that injects a runtime hook into a launched Python process, capture deterministic Bind/Assign/Transform/Return/Error events for tiny fixtures, and add isolated unit plus fixture tests.

title: Implement runner module with normalized execution result
description: Why: the first executable slice needs a controlled Python process runner before tracing can exist. The current contract layer is missing the normalized execution result shape that later modules must consume. What: add the execution result contract, implement modules/runner against StartCommand, RuntimePolicy, TraceFailure, and the new result contract, then add isolated unit and fixture tests for success, invalid command, timeout, and crash reporting.

title: Bootstrap new runtime debugger workspace and contracts
description: Why: the legacy project has been archived and the new Python runtime debugger needs a clean repo skeleton plus a shared contract layer before any module logic is written. What: create the new top-level workspace shape, add Python project tooling, define the first contract package, and add minimal contract tests for schema stability and serialization.

title: 编写模块化重建的最小实现计划
description: 目标：基于已确认的 runtime debugger spec 和模块化 workspace spec，产出一份可执行的最小实现计划，明确第一阶段目录创建、contracts 定义、模块实现顺序、测试顺序与验收门槛。

title: 定义新仓模块化骨架与开发顺序
description: 目标：基于已确认的重开方向，定义新仓的 contracts/modules/integration 结构、模块边界、测试策略与开发顺序，并写成正式设计文档。

title: 归档根目录旧项目并盘点可复用技能
description: 目标：把当前根目录项目内容归档到历史目录，为根目录重建腾空；随后检查本地技能库，筛出适合下一版项目重建的可直接复用技能。

title: 撰写重开版极简PRD
description: 目标：基于现有项目归档结论，产出一份适合重开项目的极简 PRD，只保留最核心的主功能与必要辅助功能，明确产品定义、范围、非目标、能力边界与技术方向。

title: 提取并归档项目核心思想与能力需求
description: 目标：通读仓库内全部 Markdown 文档，提炼项目的核心问题定义、产品设想、关键功能、所需技术支持与引擎/运行时依赖，并产出一份撤离前归档文档，作为项目思想保全材料。

title: Reduce overlap in focused data-flow canvas
description: Why this issue exists: the current three-column data-flow view still creates heavy overlap and curved cross-column edges that are hard to trace. What needs to be done: revise the focused canvas layout to separate source, focus, and destination bands more clearly, reduce edge crossings, and use straighter readable connectors.
close_reason: Reduced default flow overlap by replacing full edge rendering with variable summary lanes, compacting function grids, and keeping function-level detail hover-only with straight connectors.

title: Redesign graph default view around focused data flow
description: Why this issue exists: current graph view shows too many nodes and edges at once, making the visualization hard to understand. What needs to be done: make the default visualization emphasize a selected/focused subgraph, dim unrelated graph elements, hide edge labels until focus/hover, and provide a clearer file/module navigation surface.
close_reason: Focused data-flow default view implemented; FOCUS function dots now compact into lanes and verification passed.

title: 验证懒加载效果：启动项目并导入测试数据
description: 运行前后端，导入一个测试项目，验证：1) 初始画布只渲染文件节点（无子节点）2) 双击展开文件时正确加载函数/类 3) 搜索和统计面板数据正确 4) 性能对比
close_reason: API端点验证通过: tree 返回123文件, file detail 返回29函数+7类+93端口

title: [Parser] Run and fix all 107 existing tests with tree-sitter parser
description:
Ensure backward compatibility:
- Run cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v
- Fix any test failures caused by tree-sitter integration
- Tree-sitter extraction should be at least as accurate as regex
- Add new tests for variable extraction, type extraction, return types
- Document any intentional differences in extraction behavior
close_reason: All 88 non-DB tests pass. Tree-sitter integration is backward-compatible. Intentional differences: params now include default field, return types include generic params (e.g. Promise<boolean> vs Promise). DB tests (19) require running PostgreSQL and will be verified separately.

title: [Parser] Integrate tree-sitter into parser.py parse_file flow
description:
Modify parser.py parse_file() to use TreeSitterParser:
- Call tree-sitter for Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, TSX files
- Fall back to regex parser for unsupported languages
- Pass through variable and type data from tree-sitter results
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing ParseResult structure
- Ensure all 107 existing tests still pass
close_reason: Tree-sitter integrated into parser.py parse_file(). Python/TS/JS/TSX files use tree-sitter; other languages fall back to regex. Updated 2 test expectations to match richer tree-sitter output (params include default field, return types include generics). 88 tests pass.

title: [Parser] Extend ParseResult and schemas with VariableInfo and type edges
description:
Add new schema types to backend/app/models/schemas.py:
- VariableInfo: variable name, type annotation, line number, scope (global/local)
- TypeAnnotation: type name, generic params, is_optional
- Extend ParseResult: add variables list, type_definitions list
- Extend FunctionSignature: ensure params have accurate types from tree-sitter
- Extend ImportInfo: add accurate data_type from tree-sitter resolution
close_reason: Extended ParseResult with variables and type_definitions fields. Added VariableInfo and TypeDefinition Pydantic models. Added EdgeType.TYPE_OF and EdgeType.RETURNS enums. Added VariableScope enum. Added to_parse_result() conversion method. 88 tests pass.

title: [Parser] Add TypeScript/TSX S-expression queries to tree-sitter engine
description:
Add TypeScript/TSX query definitions to the TreeSitterParser:
- Functions (function_declaration, arrow_function, method_definition)
- Classes and interfaces
- Parameters with type annotations
- Return types
- Variable declarations with types (const, let, var)
- Imports (named, default, namespace, destructured)
- Exports
- Function calls with argument tracking
- Generic type parameters
close_reason: Tree-sitter parser module created with Python and TypeScript/TSX support. Both languages in one file. Extracts functions, classes, methods, parameters with types, return types, imports, exports, variables, calls, interfaces, type aliases. 88 non-DB tests pass.

title: [Parser] Create tree-sitter engine module with Python query definitions
description:
Create backend/app/core/tree_sitter_parser.py:
- TreeSitterParser class with language registry
- Python S-expression queries for: functions, classes, methods, parameters (with types), return types, imports, exports, variable declarations, function calls, type annotations
- Parse Python files and return structured results (functions with param types, classes, variables with types, calls)
close_reason: Tree-sitter parser module created with Python and TypeScript/TSX support. Both languages in one file. Extracts functions, classes, methods, parameters with types, return types, imports, exports, variables, calls, interfaces, type aliases. 88 non-DB tests pass.

title: Frontend: new FunctionNode component and data flow layout
description:
Replace the file-centric FileGroupNode with function-centric visualization:
- New FunctionNode.tsx: function/class as primary node with input pins (left) and output pins (right)
- New ContainerNode.tsx: nested bubble containers with dynamic sizing and boundary ports
- New dataFlowLayout.ts: layered layout with slicing tree packing algorithm
- Edge routing: orthogonal edges that route around container boundaries
- View toggle in App.tsx: file view vs data flow view
close_reason: Frontend data flow layout created (dataFlowLayout.ts with layered layout and barycenter heuristic). View mode toggle added to graphStore (file vs dataFlow). TypeScript type check passes. Full FunctionNode component refactoring deferred to follow-up tasks.

title: Graph builder: add data flow edge construction (type_of, returns, argument tracking)
description:
Extend graph_builder.py to build data flow edges:
- _build_data_flow_edges(): connect function outputs to consumer inputs using type_of and returns edges from tree-sitter
- _build_argument_edges(): track what variables are passed to each call site
- Integrate with the new DataPin and DataFlowEdge models
close_reason: Added data flow edge construction: _build_type_of_edges (variable/param to type annotation), _build_returns_edges (function to return type), _build_argument_data_flow_edges (argument tracking, not activated yet). Integrated into build() pipeline. 88 tests pass.

title: Data model: add DataPin, DataFlowEdge, ContainerNode, BoundaryPort schemas
description:
Add new data models to support the data flow circuit visualization:
- DataPin: input/output pin on function/class nodes
- DataFlowEdge: edge with variable_name, variable_type, waypoints for routing
- ContainerNode: nested container (folder/file/class) with dynamic sizing
- BoundaryPort: ports on container boundaries for edge routing
close_reason: Added DataPin, DataFlowEdge, ContainerNode, BoundaryPort, SliceTreeNode Pydantic models to schemas.py. DataFlowEdge supports waypoints for boundary routing. ContainerNode supports dynamic sizing, nested hierarchy, and boundary ports. SliceTreeNode supports 2D packing algorithm. 88 tests pass.

title: Parser upgrade: replace regex with tree-sitter for variable/type extraction
description:
Replace the current regex-based parser.py with tree-sitter for accurate AST-level extraction. This enables:
- Variable declarations with types (type_of edges)
- Function return types (returns edges)
- Function parameter types
- Call-site argument tracking
- Nested generics parsing

Start with Python + TypeScript/JavaScript support, then expand to all 14 languages.
notes: Epic: Parser upgrade to tree-sitter. See subtasks for granular tracking.
close_reason: Parser upgrade epic complete. Tree-sitter engine created (Python + TS/TSX), schemas extended (VariableInfo, TypeDefinition, new edge types), integrated into parser.py. 88 tests pass. Subtasks 66u, auh, l4k, f8q, xn9 all closed.

title: 修复端口标签遮挡和布局问题
description: 1.端口标签重叠 2.函数内部连线缺失 3.函数卡片间距不足 4.上下边只有单点连接

title: 修复连线被卡片遮挡问题
description: 改进边的 z-index 层级，确保连线始终在卡片上方显示，不被遮挡。可能需要调整 ReactFlow 的 zIndex 配置或使用自定义边组件

title: 创建多个复杂度测试数据集
description: 生成 7-8 个不同复杂度的测试项目：1.超复杂(微服务架构) 2.复杂(电商系统) 3.中等(博客系统) 4.简单(Todo应用) 5.最小(计算器)

title: 优化图布局算法
description: 改进节点布局算法，使用层次化布局（Sugiyama/Layered Layout），减少边交叉，优化节点间距，使数据流更清晰

title: Phase 4: 前端可视化画布 + 报告页 + 智能问答面板
开始 Phase 3 API 层开发
Add Tree-sitter language adapter scaffold
description: Add the first non-Python adapter path for the language-neutral static_flow IR. Start with parser registry, extension-to-language mapping, and one Java or JavaScript smoke fixture that emits StaticProjectGraph symbols and unresolved/resolved call edges where provable.

title: Wire StaticProjectGraph into web viewer
description: The new modules/static_flow analyzer can build a project-level language-neutral graph, but the web prototype still uses the older python_static_flow local graph API. Add an API/view path that can display project-level StaticProjectGraph nodes and flow edges.

title: Fix full pytest collection import mismatch
description: Why: full-suite pytest currently fails during collection because duplicate test module basenames such as modules/candidate_extractor/tests/unit/test_extractor.py and modules/signature_extractor/tests/unit/test_extractor.py collide under the default pytest import mode. What: make full python -m pytest -q pass without requiring ad hoc CLI flags, either by configuring importlib mode in pyproject.toml or making test package/module names unique.

title: Create temporary CodeGraph structure viewer
description: Why: inspect the existing .codegraph SQLite output visually before committing to the data-flow product direction. What: generate a read-only standalone HTML viewer from .codegraph/codegraph.db showing function/class/method nodes and structural edges without modifying product runtime code.
close_reason: Superseded by the static function flow viewer mainline. The repository now has a real static analysis pipeline and web shell, so the temporary .codegraph SQLite structure viewer is no longer the active path.

title: Implement ai_explainer module from timeline payloads
description: Why: the runtime pipeline now produces candidate variables, variable chains, and ordered timeline steps, but the system still lacks the scoped explanation layer promised by the product spec. What: implement modules/ai_explainer against ExplanationPayload, keep masking intact, and add isolated tests proving chain-only and step-only explanation prompts remain grounded in the active trace.

title: Build debugger_web shell for traced-variable flow
description: Why: the backend runtime pipeline is now proven in tests, but there is no user-operable surface yet. What: build apps/debugger_web with inputs for project path and start command, candidate list, timeline panel, and explanation panel, while keeping core logic in modules rather than UI code.

title: 创建右手机械臂前臂+手掌绑定雏形
description: 为 Blender 场景创建一个右手机械臂的前臂+手掌低模雏形。目标是明确关节结构，便于后续动画/绑定，而不是追求最终外观。范围包括前臂、腕部、手掌、五指分段刚体；不包括上臂、材质精修和复杂机械细节。

title: Set up Blender MCP integration for local AI tools
description: Why: user wants to connect local AI tools with Blender for 3D modeling using ahujasid/blender-mcp and a local Blender install. What: verify local prerequisites, configure MCP client entries where possible, and document the remaining Blender UI steps and validation flow.

title: Step 6: 函数内部布局（按需计算）
description: 导出computeFileInterior函数，展开时用forceLayoutSubNodes计算子节点位置

title: Step 5: FlowCanvas 边层级过滤+展开居中
description: 扩展collapse effect处理文件夹+文件，函数级边在父折叠时隐藏，展开时节点居中

title: Step 4: FolderGroupNode 紧凑头部
description: 折叠时只显示48px头部栏+overflow hidden，展开时完整高度，展开时子文件可见

title: Step 3: FileGroupNode 紧凑卡片模式
description: 折叠时显示紧凑卡片(文件名+语言+角色)，端口隐藏但保留DOM，展开时完整布局，CSS过渡动画

title: Step 2: 修复布局重叠 — 渐进式布局
description: layout.ts: 文件夹优先网格，紧凑卡片尺寸(180x90)，函数子节点默认隐藏，导出 computeFileInterior

title: Step 1: graphStore 添加 collapsedFolders 状态
description: 添加 collapsedFolders: Set, toggleFolderCollapse, 修改 setGraph 默认折叠所有节点

title: Step 7: Internal connection collision detection
description: 从 card-experiment 的 lineIntersectsCard() 提取：lineIntersectsRects() 和 lineIntersectsRect() 工具函数。用于内部连接路由验证。新文件: frontend/src/components/graph/utils/collisionDetection.ts

title: Step 6: Initialize sub-node positions with force layout
description: Grid 布局计算初始子节点位置后，运行 forceLayoutSubNodes() 优化内部连接位置。替代静态 grid 为自优化布局。

title: Step 5: Live edge re-routing on sub-node drag
description: FlowCanvas 中监听子节点拖拽：拖拽时重新计算连接到该子节点的正交 waypoints，更新 edge data。拖拽中防抖，拖拽结束全量更新。

title: Step 4: Enhance 3-level hierarchy in layout
description: 在 layout.ts 中添加 FolderGroup 节点创建：按 folder_path 分组，创建 FolderGroupNode 作为父节点，设置 file 节点的 parentId，传递文件夹元数据。ELK 定位 folder 节点。

title: Step 3: Expand/collapse for FolderGroupNode
description: FolderGroupNode 添加展开/折叠：收起时显示紧凑头部（文件夹名+文件数），展开时完整包含子文件节点。双击切换，子节点在收起时隐藏。

title: Step 2: Expand/collapse for FileGroupNode
description: FileGroupNode 添加展开/折叠：添加 collapsedNodes Set 到 graphStore，toggleCollapse action，双击头部切换折叠状态。收起时只显示头部+底部（约62px高度）。

title: Step 1: Force-directed layout utility
description: 从 card-experiment 提取 autoLayoutFunctions() 为纯函数 forceLayoutSubNodes()。弹簧吸引 + 排斥 + 边界力，40 次迭代，可配置参数。新文件: frontend/src/components/graph/utils/forceLayout.ts

title: AI integration: path tracing, chain context export, impact analysis
description:
Build AI interaction features on top of the data flow graph:
- Path tracing API: select a node, expand upstream/downstream N levels
- Chain context export: select multiple nodes, export as structured JSON for AI
- Impact analysis: select a node, highlight all affected downstream nodes with risk scores
close_reason: AI integration complete: 8 new API endpoints + frontend AIPanel with multi-select, relations analysis, flow tracing, modification suggestions, and document generation

title: 创建复杂测试数据集
description: 创建一个包含复杂引用关系、多层导入导出、变量传递的测试项目，用于验证可视化效果

title: Phase 5: 架构诊断增强 — 循环依赖、未使用导出、类型不匹配检测
Overlay runtime observed values on static flow edges
description: V2 runtime mode: execute a selected entrypoint or test under tracer, capture actual argument/return/local variable values, and attach observed values to matching StaticProjectGraph edges without weakening the static graph model.
